description: MCP server for parallel browser automation across multiple providers.
name: io.github.etairl/parallel-browser-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Inline JSON configuration for providers and defaults. See README for shape.
environmentVariables.name: BROWSER_MCP_CONFIG

environmentVariables.description: Path to a JSON file with provider configuration.
environmentVariables.name: BROWSER_MCP_CONFIG_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Browserbase API key (required when using the browserbase provider).
environmentVariables.name: BROWSERBASE_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Browserbase project ID (required when using the browserbase provider, unless set in config).
environmentVariables.name: BROWSERBASE_PROJECT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Anchor Browser API key (required when using the anchor provider).
environmentVariables.name: ANCHOR_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Cloudflare API token (required when using the cloudflare provider).
environmentVariables.name: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Cloudflare account ID (required when using the cloudflare provider).
environmentVariables.name: CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to launch the local Playwright provider via CloakBrowser (https://cloakbrowser.dev/) stealth Chromium. Requires installing the optional 'cloakbrowser' npm package.
environmentVariables.name: PLAYWRIGHT_USE_CLOAKBROWSER

title: Parallel Browser MCP
